generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I worry about our alliance commitments. While I support our allies, I've seen reports that some NATO members aren't pulling their weight. Why should our tax dollars go to defending countries that aren't investing in their own security? We need to make sure our commitments don't leave us vulnerable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
